title: Written in the Stars
description: A modpack with a little bit of everything. Exploration, technology, combat, farming, and more!
body:
A simple modpack designed to keep everyone happy! 

![Starry sky image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05bb320807408e72a084b9e73b320c681c0caea.jpeg)

Includes Create, the RPG series, and Farmer's Delight at its core, with many smaller mods to help bring the world to life. From new structures and world generation to new flowing water mechanics, rediscover a familiar yet different Minecraft.

Unlike many content modpacks, rather than focusing on new biomes (except a few in the End...) this pack aims to make the vanilla world even better.

Written in the Stars also includes many optimization mods to keep the experience smooth.
